title: An Explicit Skew-Hadamard Matrix of Order 1252 via Cyclotomic Unions
relevance: Most recent cyclotomic union construction; directly applicable methodology

title: Cyclotomy, Hadamard arrays and supplementary difference sets
venue: Proceedings of Conference on Combinatorial Mathematics

title: Quantum Algorithms for Weighing Matrices and Quadratic Residues

title: Extension of Paley Construction for Hadamard Matrix
